metadata.description: DeepRead — AI-native document processing API. OCR, structured extraction, PDF form filling, PII redaction, and BYOK. 97%+ accuracy via multi-model consensus. Pre-built schemas for invoices, medical records, legal contracts, and insurance claims.

plugins.name: deepread
plugins.description: DeepRead — AI-native document processing API with 97%+ accuracy. Extract text and structured data from PDFs and images, fill PDF forms with AI vision, redact 14 types of PII (HIPAA/GDPR ready), and Bring Your Own Key for zero LLM costs. Includes pre-built schemas for invoices, medical records, legal contracts, and insurance claims. Free 2,000 pages/month.
